sources.page_title: Q²M Silk Dryer EVO | Gyeon Quartz USA
sources.cleaned_content:
# Q²M Silk Dryer EVO

Price: $29.99

Experience the next level in drying technology with our Q²M Silk Dryer EVO, the ultimate silk drying towel. This revolutionary drying towel boasts an impressive GSM of 530, offering a 50% increase in total absorbency over its predecessor. The EVO variant is specially designed with reduced edges for safer and more effective use on complex-shaped panels. It's not just a drying towel; it's the best silk drying towel you'll ever use, setting new standards in performance and results.

Size: LG (28in x 35in) / SM (20in x 22in)

## SAFE AND SMOOTH DRYING

The Q²M SilkDryer EVO is a safe way to dry your car because of its advanced fiber technology. The silky-smooth gliding feature of the towel ensures a scratch and smudge-free drying process, even on the softest paintwork. Additionally, the tightly woven back of the towel stores impressive amounts of moisture, reducing the likelihood of water spots or streaks.

## DUAL SIDED MICROFIBER

This towel has two unique fibers that work together to provide unmatched drying power. The long, pointed fibers draw up water from the surface, while the tightly woven back stores impressive amounts of moisture. This makes it one of the most efficient and effective drying towels available, delivering professional-level results every time. By using the Q²M SilkDryer EVO, you can maintain your car's finish to the highest standard with ease.

## PRO TIP

For best results, machine wash the item using a gentle cycle and a maximum temperature of 86 F. Avoid tumble drying, ironing, or using bleach, as these can damage the delicate fibers of the product. By taking good care of your item, you can enjoy its superior quality and performance for years to come.

## Q²M Silk Dryer EVO - Redefining Drying Towel Excellence

Prepare to embark on a journey where innovation meets performance introducing the Q²M SilkDryer EVO, the epitome of drying towel evolution. As you delve into the realm of automotive care, be ready to discover a product that redefines your drying routine with its advanced features and impeccable performance. With a commitment to excellence, GYEON introduces the Q²M SilkDryer EVO, setting a new standard for drying towels that outshines its predecessor and stands as a testament to the brand's dedication to delivering exceptional results.

**The Evolution of Excellence:**
The Q²M SilkDryer EVO isn't just an upgrade it's a revolution. This drying towel represents the pinnacle of innovation and performance, reimagining the very concept of drying your vehicle. With a higher GSM of 530, the EVO variant stands as a testament to GYEON's unwavering commitment to excellence, outperforming its predecessor with a remarkable 50% increase in total absorbency.

**A Symphony of Advanced Features:**

(1) Impressive Absorbency: The heart of the Q²M SilkDryer EVO lies in its unprecedented absorbency. With a higher GSM, this drying towel absorbs moisture like never before, effortlessly whisking away water droplets and ensuring a streak-free finish that enhances the appearance of your vehicle.

(2) Enhanced Functionality: The reduced edges of the Q²M SilkDryer EVO redefine its functionality, making it even safer to use on complex-shaped panels. With improved maneuverability, this drying towel ensures that every inch of your vehicle receives the care and attention it deserves, leaving no corner untouched.

**A Product for Discerning Enthusiasts:**
The Q²M SilkDryer EVO is tailor-made for discerning car enthusiasts who demand nothing less than perfection. This drying towel redefines the expectations of performance, delivering results that stand as a testament to your commitment to excellence.

**Elevating Your Drying Routine:**

(1) Exceptional Performance: Q²M SilkDryer EVO isn't merely a drying towel; it's an experience that elevates your automotive care regimen. Witness the transformation as the higher GSM and increased absorbency of the EVO variant ensure that drying your vehicle becomes a swift and efficient endeavor.

(2) Unparalleled Results: Bid farewell to streaks and water spots as the Q²M SilkDryer EVO effortlessly absorbs moisture, leaving your vehicle's surface immaculate and ready to shine. Embrace the perfection of a streak-free finish that enhances the beauty of your vehicle.

(3) Innovative Design: Explore the enhanced functionality of the Q²M SilkDryer EVO as reduced edges make it safer and more versatile to use on various vehicle panels. Experience improved maneuverability and coverage as you dry your vehicle to perfection.

Q²M SilkDryer EVO a testament to GYEON's pursuit of perfection in every product, a promise of unparalleled drying performance that transcends expectations.

sources.cleaned_content:
# GYEON Q²M SilkDryer EVO İnovatif Kurulama Havlusu – 70 × 90 cm

Markası: GYEON
Barkodu: 8809432671480
Stok Miktarı: Stokta Var
Fiyat: 1.300,00 TL
Değerlendirme: 5/5 (1 Değerlendirme)

DÜNYA'DA EN ÇOK TERCİH EDİLEN İNOVATİF KURULAMA HAVLUSU

Twist yapılı, benzersiz sentetik mikrofiber örgüsü sayesinde GYEON Q²M SilkDryer EVO; %50 artırılmış su emiş gücü, ipeksi kayganlık ve çiziksiz sonuçlarıyla kurulamayı bambaşka bir seviyeye taşır. 530 GSM'lik yeni EVO versiyonu, kısaltılmış kenar yapısıyla en girintili çıkıntılı panellerde bile güvenli ve leke bırakmayan performans sunar.

## Öne Çıkan Özellikler

• Devasa Su Emiş Gücü – Yüksek yoğunluklu lifler, havlunun kendi ağırlığının 10 katı suyu tek geçişte hapseder.
• İpeksi Kayganlık – Boya, cam ve trim üzerinde sürtünmeyi minimuma indirir; çizik ve hologram riskini ortadan kaldırır.
• Geniş Yüzey Kapsamı – 70 × 90 cm ebatı, sedan'dan SUV'a tam aracı dakikalar içinde kurular.
• Kenarsız Güvenlik – Isı kesimli logo ve ultra-kısa kenar mikrofiberleri, hassas verniklerde bile tam koruma sağlar.
• Çok Yönlü Kullanım – Boya, cam, PPF, jant ve piano-black kaplamalarda aynı derecede etkilidir.

## Teknik Bilgiler

| Özellik | Değer |
|---|---|
| Boyut | 70 × 90 cm |
| Yoğunluk (GSM) | 530 g/m² |
| Lif Oranı | 80% polyester / 20% polyamid |
| Su Emiş Kapasitesi | Ağırlığının 10 katı |
| Yıkanabilirlik | Evet (30 °C, GYEON Q²M TowelWash) |

## Nasıl Kullanılır?

1. Aracınızı pH-nötr şampuanla yıkayıp durulayın.
2. SilkDryer EVO'yu ıslak yüzeye serin; hafif basınçla kaydırın veya pürüzsüzce pat-dry yapın.
3. Havlunun doygunluğu arttığında ters yüz edin ve devam edin.
4. İşlem sonrası 30 °C'de, sıvı deterjanla makinede yıkayın; sıkmadan, sererek kurutun.

## Kullanım Alanları

• Tam Araç Kurulama – Binek, SUV, ticari; tek havluyla eksiksiz sonuç.
• Hassas Boyalar – Yumuşak vernikli ya da koyu renk araçlarda çiziksiz kurutma.
• Kaplamalı Yüzeyler – Seramik, wax veya sealant korumalı araçlarda su lekesini önler.
• Cam & Trim – Yan cam, sunroof, plastik ve piano-black alanlarda iz bırakmaz.
• Mobil Detailing & Filo – Minimum ekipman, maksimum verimlilik ve hız.

## Neden GYEON Q²M SilkDryer EVO?

• %50 Daha Fazla Emiş – Önceki modele göre yarım litre fazladan suyu hapseder.
• Uzun Ömür – Kenarsız, ısı damgalı logo; 100+ yıkama döngüsüne dayanır.
• Güvenli Ergonomi – İpeksi dokusu sürtünmeyi azaltır, elde kolay kavranır.
• Ekonomik Kullanım – Tek havluyla tam araç; ekstra kurulama bezine gerek kalmaz.

## Önerilen Aksesuar ve Tamamlayıcı Ürünler

| Ürün | Amaç | Uyum |
|---|---|---|
| GYEON Q²M Bathe+ | Yıkama sırasında SiO² takviyesi | Suyu boncuklandırır, kurulamayı kolaylaştırır |
| GYEON Q²M WetCoat | Durulama öncesi hızlı cila | Hidrofobiyi artırır, havlunun kayganlığını yükseltir |
| GYEON Q²M TowelWash | Mikrofiber bakım deterjanı | Lif ömrünü uzatır, yumuşaklığı korur |
| GYEON Q²M Prep | Kaplama öncesi yağ temizliği | Kurulama sonrası saf yüzey sağlar |

## Sıkça Sorulan Sorular (FAQ)

S: SilkDryer EVO'yu seramik kaplamalı araçlarda kullanabilir miyim?
C: Evet. Kaplamaya zarar vermez, aksine su lekesi oluşumunu engeller.

S: 70 × 90 cm bana büyük geliyor; daha küçük versiyonu var mı?
C: 50 × 55 cm versiyonu mevcuttur; motosiklet ve dar alanlar için idealdir.

S: Makinede yıkarken hangi deterjanı kullanmalıyım?
C: Sıvı, sabun tozu içermeyen deterjan kullanın; yumuşatıcı ve ağartıcıdan kaçının.

S: Kenar dikişi olmadığı için sökülme olur mu?
C: Hayır. Kenarlar ısı kesimli olduğu için lif atması ve sökülme riski minimaldir.

GYEON Q²M SilkDryer EVO, ipeksi dokusu ve üstün emiş gücüyle kurulamayı saniyelere indirir; çizik ve leke endişesini ortadan kaldırır. Tek geçiş, devasa su emişi ve kalıcı yumuşaklık – profesyonel sonuçlar artık herkesin elinde!

## Yorumlar

5/5 - "Efsane. Böyle bir kurulama performansı ben hayatımda çok az deneyimlerim. Pürüzsüz sıfır hav mükemmel emme. Ürün parasını kesinlikle hak ediyor." (10.01.2024)

# Q²M SILKDRYER EVO

Category: Exterior / Accessories

Improved and more absorbent than ever! Twist-loop, synthetic fibres for impressive drying and a streak-free finish.

Q²M SilkDryer EVO is an updated and improved version of one of the most innovative drying towels. Compared with the version introduced in 2015, the EVO variant features a higher GSM of 530. The total absorbency is up to 50% higher than before. Reduced edges to an absolute minimum make the towel even more functional and safer on complex-shaped panels.

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

Sizes: 50x55 cm / 70x90 cm

## HOW TO USE

1. Lay the towel flat on a wet surface.
2. Gently pull or pat to absorb water.
3. Avoid applying pressure during drying.
4. Wring out if saturated and continue.
5. Wash after use to maintain performance.

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Q: What is SILKDRYER EVO used for?
A: Drying painted surfaces after washing.

Q: Is it safe on ceramic coatings?
A: Yes, it is suitable for coated vehicles.

Q: Does it require pressure to work?
A: No, it absorbs water with minimal contact.

Q: Can it be used on glass and trim?
A: Yes, it can be used on exterior surfaces.

Q: How should it be maintained?
A: Wash with a dedicated microfibre detergent.

## Recommended Pairing

- Q²M SMOOTHIE EVO: It's an improved version of our legendary synthetic wash mitt.
- Q²M BATHE (500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML): Slick, concentrated and pH-neutral shampoo.
- Q²M SOFTWIPE EVO (40x40 cm): Extremely thick, but its gentle fibres are perfect for wiping coatings, as well as all types of quick detailers and spray sealants.
- Q²M TOWELWASH (500 ML): Superb microfiber and wool washing aid.

# Q²M SilkDryer EVO Drying Towel

Brand: GYEON
Art. nr. GYSILKEVO
Rating: 4.8 (115 reviews)
Price: € 28.99
Status: In stock
Sizes available: 50x55cm / 70x90cm

## Key Features

- New microfiber structure for enhanced performance
- Leaves no streaks for a flawless finish
- Ultra-smooth drying to prevent marring

## Description

New and absorbs better than ever!

Q²M SilkDryer EVO is an enhanced version of one of the most innovative drying towels. Compared to the version introduced in 2015, the EVO variant has a higher grams per m² count of 530. The total absorption is up to 50% higher than before. The edges have been reduced to an absolute minimum to make the towel even more functional and safer for complex-shaped panels.

Drying has never been easier! With Q²M SilkDryer EVO, you can rely on an unmatched drying experience and a flawless finish. The redesigned twisted synthetic fibers absorb moisture like never before, leaving your vehicle dry in no time. No streaks, no drops, just a shiny and impeccable finish.

Whether you're a professional detailer or simply want to care for your own car, Q²M SilkDryer EVO offers the perfect combination of functionality and quality. With its improved absorption capacity and minimalist design, this drying towel ensures even the most hard-to-reach surfaces can be safely and thoroughly dried.

Choose the ultimate drying experience and let Q²M SilkDryer EVO leave your car sparkling and dry in an instant. Get ready for a new standard in car drying!

## Specifications

- Size: 70 x 90 cm
- Weight: 530 gram/m²

## Improved Absorption

The Q²M SilkDryer EVO now absorbs up to 50% more moisture than before, thanks to the advanced synthetic fibers. This makes drying faster and more efficient, so your car is dry in no time.

## Safe and Smooth Drying

Thanks to the ultra-smooth design of the Q²M SilkDryer EVO, drying is a safe experience with no risk of scratches or marring, even on the softest paintwork. Complex surfaces are effortlessly and safely dried.

## Streak-Free Finish

The Q²M SilkDryer EVO delivers a flawless finish without streaks or droplets, ensuring a shiny result. Whether you have a coated or uncoated car, you can rely on an impeccable drying experience.

## Reviews (selection from 115)

- "De varianten van Monello zijn zeer vergelijkbaar en een heel stuk goedkoper. Doe er je voordeel mee." - Joël (24/12/2025)
- "Ik heb mijn auto proberen te drogen met deze doek maar snel was hij kletsnat en moeilijk uit te wringen. Heb een tweede doek moeten gebruiken om na te vegen. Had er meer van verwacht." - Sabine (14/08/2025)
- "Hoewel de grootte natuurlijk persoonlijke voorkeur is, en je met een kleine met een goede techniek net zo veel kunt ;) is deze doek van goede kwaliteit en zeker een aanrader" - Mike (09/08/2025)

# GYEON Q²M SilkDryer EVO

Brand: Gyeon
Price: $34.99 CAD (70x90 CM) / $23.00 CAD (50x55 CM)
Sizes: 50x55 CM / 70x90 CM
Barcode (70x90): 8809432671480
Barcode (50x55): 8809432671473

## No water left behind.

The Q²M SilkDryer EVO is an updated and improved version of one of the most innovative drying towels. Compared to the original version introduced in 2015, the EVO variant boasts a higher GSM boost and an absorbency that is up to 50% greater. The edges have been reduced to an absolute minimum, making the towel even more functional and safer to use on complex-shaped panels.

## Twisted Loop for better absorption

Twisted loop technology enhances the surface area and absorbency of microfiber towels, making them ideal for drying cars and other surfaces.
Faster Drying: The longer pile and increased fiber surface contact of twisted loop towels enable quicker drying.

## Zero scratch

Safe on All Surfaces: These towels are safe to use on all paint types, wraps, and paint protection films.
Soft Touch: The gentle texture of twisted loop towels helps keep a car's paint scratch-free and swirl-free.

## Description

GYEON Silk Dryer IMPROVED & MORE ABSORBENT THAN EVER! TWIST-LOOP, SYNTHETIC FIBRES FOR IMPRESSIVE DRYING AND A STREAK-FREE FINISH.

Q²M SilkDryer EVO is an updated and improved version of one of the most innovative drying towels. Compared with the version introduced back in 2015, the EVO variant features a higher GSM at 530. The total absorbency is up to 50% higher than before. Reduced edges to an absolute minimum, to make the towel even more functional and safer on complex-shaped panels.

## FAQ

Q: Are these machine washable?
A: Yes, GYEON Silk Dryer EVO and other EVO towels are durable, machine washable, and safe for tumble drying.

Q: Does it feel "crunchy" and seem less absorbent?
A: Hard water and mineral deposits can eventually affect the performance of the towel. Preventive measures, such as soaking it in a vinegar solution to break down hardened deposits, can help. However, it's best to replace the towel once it becomes overly stiff. Saving a crusty towel isn't worth the risk of scratching your paint.
